grade_4.Basic: Partial mastery of prerequisite knowledge and skills fundamental for proficient work at the 4th grade level
grade_4.Proficient: Solid academic performance. Students reaching this level have demonstrated competency over challenging subject matter, including subject-matter knowledge, application of such knowledge to real-world situations, and analytical skills appropriate to the subject matter
grade_4.Advanced: Superior performance beyond proficient at grade 4. Fourth-grade students performing at this level should apply integrated procedural knowledge and conceptual understanding to complex and non-routine real-world problem solving

grade_8.Basic: Partial mastery of prerequisite knowledge and skills fundamental for proficient work at the 8th grade level
grade_8.Proficient: Solid academic performance at grade 8. Students use general mathematical rules and concepts to solve multi-step problems, and they can represent relationships with data tables and graphs
grade_8.Advanced: Superior performance at grade 8. Students can reason, solve problems, and communicate their thinking using a variety of mathematical concepts

grade_12.Basic: Partial mastery of prerequisite knowledge and skills fundamental for proficient work at grade 12
grade_12.Proficient: Solid academic performance at grade 12. Students demonstrate an understanding of mathematical concepts and procedures and can apply mathematical knowledge
grade_12.Advanced: Superior performance at grade 12. Students demonstrate in-depth understanding and apply mathematical concepts
